title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
summary: The 30-year Treasury yield has reached 5.1%, its highest level in nearly a year, driven by Friday's market spike amid ongoing inflation concerns. The rise reflects uncertainty about interest rate policy under new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh.
content: Treasuries spiked on Friday as inflation signals continue to muddy interest rate expectations under the new Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh.

zh.title: 30年期国债收益率升至5.1%，近一年来最高
zh.summary: 30年期国债收益率达到5.1%，为近一年来最高水平，受周五市场涨幅推动，同时面临持续的通胀担忧。这一上升反映了市场对新美联储主席凯文·沃什的利率政策的不确定性。

title: ‘I experienced many years of poverty’: I worked until 70. Why do wealthy retirees look down on those with less savings?
summary: The article explores attitudes toward wealth inequality among retirees, featuring perspectives from those who worked into their 70s to maximize Social Security benefits. It examines potential social stigma and class divisions regarding retirement savings disparities.
content: “I worked until 70 to delay taking Social Security.”

zh.title: "我经历了多年的贫困":我一直工作到70岁。为什么富有的退休人士看不起储蓄少的人?
zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了退休人士对财富不平等的态度，介绍了为了最大化社会保障福利而工作到70多岁的人的观点。它审视了与退休储蓄差异相关的潜在社会污名和阶级分化。

title: The stock market surge has delivered a rare signal. Here’s what history suggests happens next, says Goldman Sachs.
summary: Recent stock market momentum has generated a historically significant signal, though Goldman Sachs strategists caution that high risk appetite may signal future volatility. Analysis of historical patterns suggests such momentum-driven rallies have often preceded market corrections.
content: Momentum and risk appetite are ascendant, but that may be a problem, say Goldman Sachs strategists.

zh.title: 股市上涨传递了一个罕见信号。高盛表示，历史表明接下来会发生什么。
zh.summary: 最近的股市上升趋势产生了历史上显著的信号，尽管高盛策略师警告说，高风险偏好可能预示未来的波动。对历史模式的分析表明，这种由动量驱动的反弹往往先于市场调整。

title: Helping an aging parent with finances can put you 'in conflict,' CFP says — how to approach it
summary: Adult children increasingly face the need to manage aging parents' finances, a transition that can create family conflict according to certified financial planners. The article provides guidance on navigating this sensitive situation effectively.
content: It's not uncommon for adult children to realize they may need to help manage their aging parents' finances. Here's how to approach the transition.

zh.title: 帮助年迈的父母管理财务可能会让你"陷入冲突"，CFP说——如何应对
zh.summary: 成人子女越来越需要管理年迈父母的财务，这一转变可能会引发家庭冲突，根据认证财务规划师的说法。这篇文章提供了有效处理这一敏感情况的指导。

title: Detroit automakers have cut more than 20,000 U.S. salaried jobs as AI threat looms
summary: Major Detroit automakers have eliminated over 20,000 U.S. salaried positions as they adapt to technological disruption, particularly the emergence of artificial intelligence. The job cuts reflect broader industry transformation in automotive manufacturing.
content: Reasons for the job declines vary by automaker, but are generally tied to evolving technological changes in the industry — including the rise of AI.

zh.title: 底特律汽车制造商已削减超过20,000个美国薪酬员工岗位，AI威胁逼近
zh.summary: 主要的底特律汽车制造商已经消除了超过20,000个美国薪酬职位，以适应技术中断，特别是人工智能的出现。这些工作削减反映了汽车制造业更广泛的行业转变。

title: Trump told Xi ‘I don't talk about’ whether U.S. would defend Taiwan from China
summary: During a two-day China visit, President Trump declined to confirm whether the U.S. would defend Taiwan militarily, addressing the sensitive geopolitical issue with ambiguity. The visit also included discussions on Iran and trade agreements with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
content: President Donald Trump spoke about Taiwan after a two-day visit to China, where he said he discussed Iran, and trade deals with Chinese President Xi Jingping.

zh.title: 特朗普告诉习"我不谈论"美国是否会保卫台湾免受中国侵犯
zh.summary: 在访华两天期间，特朗普总统拒绝确认美国是否会在军事上保卫台湾，用模棱两可的方式处理这一敏感的地缘政治问题。访问还包括与中国国家主席习近平关于伊朗和贸易协议的讨论。

title: Magnum Ice Cream stock soars after report of potential private equity takeover
summary: Magnum Ice Cream's stock price surged following reports of a potential private equity acquisition, only six months after its spin-off from Unilever that made it the world's largest independent ice cream company. The rapid change reflects investor interest in the newly independent brand.
content: It comes just six months after Magnum spun off from Unilever to create the world's largest standalone ice cream maker.

zh.title: 美嘉冰淇淋股价在潜在私募股权接管报道后飙升
zh.summary: 美嘉冰淇淋的股价在潜在私募股权收购报道后大幅上升，这发生在其从联合利华分拆仅六个月之后。该分拆使其成为全球最大的独立冰淇淋公司。这种快速变化反映了投资者对新独立品牌的兴趣。

title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Alphabet, Dell, Cisco, Netflix, Texas Roadhouse, J.M. Smucker & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on Friday regarding leading tech and consumer stocks including Nvidia, Alphabet, Cisco, and Netflix. The calls span technology, entertainment, and consumer sectors.
content: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周五最重要的分析师评级：英伟达、谷歌、戴尔、思科、奈飞、德州牛排屋等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师在周五对包括英伟达、谷歌、思科和奈飞在内的领先科技和消费股发表了重要评级。这些评级涵盖科技、娱乐和消费部门。

title: How to plan a trip for medical tourism and the best resources
summary: The article provides guidance for individuals considering medical procedures abroad, offering resources to navigate the growing medical tourism sector. This option is driven by factors such as cost savings and access to specialized treatments.
content: If you're seeking a medical procedure abroad, these resources can help.

zh.title: 如何规划医疗旅游之行及最佳资源
zh.summary: 该文章为考虑在国外进行医疗程序的个人提供指导，并提供了应对不断增长的医疗旅游部门的资源。这一选择由成本节约和获得专业治疗等因素驱动。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Applied Materials, Intel, Magnum Ice Cream and more
summary: Several stocks including Applied Materials, Intel, and Magnum Ice Cream experienced significant premarket price movements ahead of regular trading hours. The shifts indicate investor sentiment on technology and consumer sectors before market open.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：应用材料公司、英特尔、Magnum冰淇淋等
zh.summary: 包括应用材料公司、英特尔和Magnum冰淇淋在内的几只股票在常规交易时间前经历了显著的盘前价格波动。这些变化反映了投资者在市场开盘前对科技和消费品板块的看法。

title: Cisco just had a massive rally. HSBC says the stock still has momentum
summary: Cisco's stock continued gaining momentum following strong fiscal third-quarter earnings results, with HSBC analysts predicting further upside. The rally reflects investor confidence in the company's operational performance and growth trajectory.
content: Cisco is showing no signs of losing steam following its blowout fiscal third-quarter earnings report, according to HSBC.

zh.title: 思科刚刚大幅上涨。汇丰银行表示该股仍有上升势头
zh.summary: 思科股票在强劲的第三财政季度财报后继续上升，汇丰银行分析师预测还会进一步上涨。这波上涨反映了投资者对公司运营表现和增长轨迹的信心。

title: Maine might boot Sen. Susan Collins. It could hurt the state's wallet for years
summary: Senator Susan Collins' potential loss in Maine could have significant economic consequences for the state, as she chairs the powerful Senate Appropriations Committee. Her position as the last New England Republican in Congress amplifies the potential financial impact of her departure.
content: Sen. Susan Collins is the lone New England Republican left in Congress and chairs the Senate Appropriations Committee.

zh.title: 缅因州可能会罢免苏珊·科林斯参议员。这可能会伤害该州的财政多年
zh.summary: 缅因州苏珊·科林斯参议员可能落选，这可能对该州造成重大经济后果，因为她担任强大的参议院拨款委员会主席。她作为国会中最后一位新英格兰共和党人的地位放大了她离职可能带来的财务影响。

title: We’re in our 40s. Our mortgage is nearly paid off — how should we invest our extra $1,500 a month?
summary: A couple in their 40s seeks investment advice for $1,500 monthly surplus as they approach mortgage payoff, having already allocated $1,000 monthly to an American Funds Growth and Income fund. The query addresses portfolio optimization strategies for pre-retirement wealth building.
content: “We already deposit $1,000 each month into the American Funds Growth and Income Portfolio Class A fund.”

zh.title: 我们年过40岁。我们的抵押贷款即将还清——我们如何投资每月额外的1,500美元？
zh.summary: 一对40多岁的夫妇面临每月1,500美元的投资盈余问题，因为他们的抵押贷款即将还清，已经每月在美国基金增长和收入基金中投入1,000美元。这个问题涉及退休前财富积累的投资组合优化策略。

title: Can’t afford to buy a new fridge or dishwasher over Memorial Day? A better holiday sale is coming up.
summary: High gas prices are dampening consumer enthusiasm for major appliance purchases during Memorial Day sales, with retailers and analysts predicting better bargains at upcoming holiday events. The article addresses economic headwinds affecting household spending on big-ticket items.
content: Many Americans are uncomfortable buying big-ticket appliances while gas prices are so high

zh.title: 在阵亡将士纪念日期间买不起新冰箱或洗碗机？更好的假日促销即将到来。
zh.summary: 高油价正在削弱消费者在阵亡将士纪念日促销期间购买大型电器的热情，零售商和分析师预测即将推出的假日活动会有更好的优惠。文章讨论了影响消费者大额家庭支出的经济逆风。

title: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
summary: UK borrowing costs have increased and the pound has weakened amid political uncertainty, with markets concerned about potential increases in government spending under a potential Burnham-led administration. The currency and bond market movements reflect investor anxiety about future fiscal policy.
content: Analysts say the moves have been fuelled by concerns a Burnham-led government would increase government borrowing.

zh.title: 英国借贷成本上升，英镑下跌，领导权争夺继续
zh.summary: 在政治不确定性中，英国借贷成本增加，英镑走弱。市场担忧在潜在的伯纳姆领导的政府下政府支出可能增加。货币和债券市场波动反映了投资者对未来财政政策的忧虑。

title: British Gas pays £20m over force-fitting of prepayment meters
summary: British Gas is paying £20 million to settle allegations that debt agents forcibly entered homes of vulnerable customers to install prepayment meters. This settlement addresses serious breaches of consumer protection and highlights predatory debt collection practices.
content: Debt agents working for British Gas had broken into the homes of vulnerable customers to fit pre-payment energy meters.

zh.title: 英国燃气公司因强制安装预付费电表支付2000万英镑
zh.summary: 英国燃气公司支付2000万英镑，以解决债务代理人强行进入弱势客户家中安装预付费电表的指控。这一和解协议解决了消费者保护的严重违规行为，突显了掠夺性债务催收做法。

title: Trump leaves China after talks dominated by trade, oil and Taiwan
summary: President Trump concluded a two-day visit to China with Xi Jinping, focusing on trade negotiations, oil purchases, and Taiwan issues amid ongoing tensions. The meetings represent efforts to ease diplomatic friction between the two powers.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump traveled to China this week for two days of meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping, after a year of heightened trade tensions.

zh.title: 特朗普在与习近平会谈后离开中国，会议主要讨论贸易、石油和台湾问题
zh.summary: 特朗普总统与习近平结束了为期两天的中国访问，重点关注贸易谈判、石油购买和台湾问题，但持续存在紧张局势。这些会议代表了两个大国缓解外交摩擦的努力。

title: China to buy U.S. oil to feed its 'insatiable appetite,' Trump tells Fox News
summary: Trump announced that China has agreed to purchase American oil as part of ongoing trade negotiations with President Xi Jinping. The deal aims to address trade imbalances and boost U.S. energy exports.
content: Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping are scheduled to meet Friday to close out a two-day summit that has featured pageantry and dealmaking.

zh.title: 特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，中国将购买美国石油以满足其"永不满足的胃口"
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布中国同意购买美国石油，作为与习近平总统进行的贸易谈判的一部分。该协议旨在解决贸易失衡问题并促进美国能源出口。

title: Singapore Airlines sticking with Air India for the "long game" despite losses
summary: Singapore Airlines continues its investment in Air India despite the subsidiary dragging on earnings, viewing the commitment as a long-term strategic play. The airline believes the investment will deliver returns over time despite current financial headwinds.
content: Air India has been a big drag on SIA's earnings, but the airline says its investment is part of the "long game"

zh.title: 新加坡航空公司尽管亏损坚持长期投资印度航空
zh.summary: 新加坡航空公司继续投资印度航空，尽管该子公司拖累了其收入，但该公司将这一承诺视为长期战略举措。该航空公司相信，尽管目前面临财务困难，但该投资最终将带来回报。

title: Trump brought top CEOs to Beijing but few big deals emerge
summary: Trump's trip to Beijing included high-profile CEO delegations, yet produced limited concrete trade agreements despite staged ceremonies and negotiations with Xi Jinping. The visit highlighted the challenges in reaching comprehensive trade settlements between the U.S. and China.
content: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no sweeping trade breakthrough as Trump met Xi in Beijing.

zh.title: 特朗普将美国顶级首席执行官带到北京但很少有大型交易达成
zh.summary: 特朗普赴北京之行包括高知名度的首席执行官代表团，但尽管进行了舞台化的仪式和与习近平的谈判，却产生了有限的具体贸易协议。访问突显了美中之间达成全面贸易协议的挑战。

title: Billionaire Gautam Adani and nephew agree to pay $18 million in SEC settlement over fraud allegations
summary: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani and his nephew agreed to settle SEC fraud charges by paying $18 million, resolving allegations they misled investors. The settlement closes a major legal challenge to one of India's most prominent business figures.
content: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani and his nephew Sagar Adani have agreed to settle a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit over allegations they misled investors.

zh.title: 亿万富翁高塔姆·阿达尼及其侄子同意支付1800万美元解决证监会欺诈指控
zh.summary: 印度亿万富翁高塔姆·阿达尼和他的侄子同意通过支付1800万美元来解决证监会欺诈指控，解决了他们误导投资者的指控。该和解结束了对印度最杰出商人之一的一项重大法律挑战。

title: 'Not having a proper funeral left me with painful memories'
summary: Ed Cullen experienced emotional distress from his mother's unattended cremation, which saved money but lacked the closure of a traditional funeral service. The story raises questions about the emotional and social costs of budget funeral options.
content: Ed Cullen says his mum had an unattended cremation which saved money but was "devastating" for him.

zh.title: 没有举办体面的葬礼给我留下了痛苦的回忆
zh.summary: 埃德·卡伦为母亲选择无人值守火化而感到情感困扰，虽然节省了费用，但缺乏传统葬礼仪式带来的心理救赎。这个故事引发了人们对预算葬礼选择的情感和社会成本的思考。

title: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
summary: The Musk v. Altman trial revealed disputed claims between the tech titans and exposed questionable practices within the tech industry during weeks of testimony. The jury is now set to decide the case as deliberations approach.
content: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.

zh.title: 声称、反驳与科技业阴暗面曝光：我们从马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事

title: Hotel owners expected a World Cup boom - so far it hasn't happened
summary: Hotels in World Cup host cities have not seen the expected tourism surge, with industry surveys describing the tournament as a 'non-event' for occupancy. The shortfall challenges assumptions about the economic benefits of hosting major sporting events.
content: An industry body survey found hotels in World Cup host cities see the tournament as a "non-event".

title: Honda shares rise over 7% as investors shrug off first operating loss in nearly 70 years
summary: Honda's stock jumped over 7% despite reporting its first annual operating loss in nearly seven decades, suggesting investor optimism about turnaround prospects. The positive market reaction indicates confidence in management's recovery plans.
content: Honda Motor rose over 7% on Friday, even after posting its first annual operating loss in nearly 70 years.

title: Nvidia earnings alone won’t rescue the S&P 500 from its new sell signal
summary: The S&P 500 has triggered overbought warnings heading into a major earnings season led by Nvidia and retail giants. Even strong Nvidia results may not reverse the broader market's technical sell signals, analysts warn.
content: Overbought warnings come ahead of a massive tech and retail earnings lineup.

zh.title: 英伟达财报单独无法拯救标普500指数摆脱其新卖出信号
zh.summary: 标普500指数在由英伟达和零售巨头主导的大规模财报季到来之际触发了超买警告。分析师警告，即使英伟达财报强劲，也可能无法扭转更广泛市场的技术性卖出信号。

title: Oil prices jump after Trump says China agreed to buy U.S. crude following Xi talks
summary: Oil prices surged on news that China agreed to purchase American crude oil as part of Trump's negotiations with Xi Jinping. The agreement could significantly increase U.S. oil exports and reshape global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose Friday on news that China has agreed to purchase oil from America

zh.title: 特朗普称中国同意购买美国原油后油价跳涨
zh.summary: 在中国同意购买美国原油的消息传出后，油价上升，这是特朗普与习近平谈判的结果。该协议可能会大幅增加美国石油出口，并重塑全球能源市场。

title: Dead people claiming Social Security? Here’s one — but we’re still looking for the other 19,999,999.
summary: Investigators found one confirmed case of a deceased person claiming Social Security benefits, but audits suggest potentially millions more fraudulent claims remain undiscovered. The investigation highlights ongoing challenges in verifying beneficiary status within the program.
content: After a year of hunting down Social Security cheats, here’s where we stand.

zh.title: 已故人士领取社会保障金？我们找到了一个——但还在寻找其他1999万9999个
zh.summary: 调查人员发现了一例确认的已故人士领取社会保障福利的案例，但审计表明可能还有数百万起欺诈性领取未被发现。该调查突显了在核实项目内受益人身份时面临的持续挑战。

title: Closing arguments conclude in Musk v. Altman, jury to deliberate next week
summary: Closing arguments wrapped up in the Musk v. Altman case with jury deliberations set to begin Monday, though the verdict will be advisory only. The case centers on disputes between the tech entrepreneurs over OpenAI's direction and governance.
content: The jury's verdict in Musk v. Altman will be advisory, and deliberations are set to begin on Monday.

zh.title: 马斯克诉奥特曼案结案陈词完成，陪审团下周开始评议
zh.summary: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的结案陈词已完成，陪审团将于下周一开始评议，尽管裁决将仅具有顾问性质。该案的核心是两位科技企业家围绕OpenAI方向和治理的纠纷。

title: South Korea's Kospi hit fresh record of 8,000 as Trump-Xi talks enter second day
summary: South Korea's Kospi index reached a record high of 8,000 as investors monitored ongoing high-level negotiations between Trump and Xi Jinping, reflecting market optimism amid diplomatic developments.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed as investors tracked the second day of high-stakes talks between Donald Trump and Xi Jinping.

zh.title: 韩国综合指数创历史新高达8000，特朗普-习近平谈话进入第二天

title: This summer’s World Cup will be no match for Taylor Swift when it comes to live events
summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup running June 11-July 19 across North America faces competition from major live events, with tickets ranging from $1,640 to over $10,000 despite significant venue availability.
content: The World Cup runs from June 11 to July 19, with games being played in cities across the U.S., Canada and Mexico. Tickets went on sale in October and have sold for as much as $10,000, with the cheapest options to see the U.S. team running around $1,640.

zh.title: 今年夏天世界杯将无法与泰勒·斯威夫特的现场演出相抗衡
zh.summary: 2026年FIFA世界杯将在北美地区举行，时间为6月11日至7月19日，尽管有大量场地可用，但面临来自重大现场活动的竞争，门票价格从1,640美元到10,000美元以上不等。

title: Figma has a fix for its ailing stock — a new way to make money off its AI products
summary: Figma's stock surged after beating earnings expectations and raising its full-year outlook, driven by new monetization strategies for its AI-powered design products.
content: Figma’s stock soars after earnings beat expectations again, and the full-year outlook was raised.

zh.title: Figma找到了解决股票困境的办法——利用其AI产品获利的新方式
zh.summary: Figma股价在超过盈利预期并提高全年展望后大幅上涨，这是由其AI驱动设计产品的新货币化策略推动的。
